label: Vendor Briefing
definition: Data derived from vendor-provided briefings and documentation

label: Product Evaluation
definition: Analysis based on product feature assessment by Aberdeen analysts

label: User Interviews
definition: Data collected from end-user interviews and field surveys

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Analyst expert opinion, prediction, or recommendation

label: Field Research
definition: Aberdeen ongoing field research and customer interviews

label: Competitive Analysis
definition: Aberdeen competitive market analysis and benchmarking

label: Public Record
definition: Verified post-publication fact from public record (press release, news)

label: Historical Record
definition: Verified outcome based on documented historical sources

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Post-study documented result that validates or refutes an earlier claim

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Quantitative performance measurement from a formal or informal benchmark

label: Framework Factor
definition: A criterion or dimension in an analyst's evaluative framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative market size, growth, or segment statistic

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity, capabilities, or fitness

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Forward-looking claim about viability of a product, company, or market
